name: DeepL
description: DeepL provides neural machine translation with best-in-class quality for over 30 languages. It supports text and document translation, custom glossaries, formality control, and usage monitoring.

capabilities.name: translate_text
capabilities.description: Translate one or more text strings between languages with optional formality, glossary, and context-aware quality improvements.

capabilities.name: translate_document
capabilities.description: Upload and translate entire documents (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, etc.) while preserving formatting and layout.

capabilities.name: list_languages
capabilities.description: Retrieve the list of supported source and target languages with their language codes.

capabilities.name: manage_glossary
capabilities.description: Create, list, or delete custom glossaries that enforce consistent translations of specific terms.

capabilities.name: check_usage
capabilities.description: Retrieve current API usage statistics including character counts and limits for your subscription.
